items.question: How long do paver installations last?
items.answer: Properly installed pavers can last 30+ years, and individual pavers can be replaced if one is ever damaged.

items.question: Are pavers better than poured concrete?
items.answer: Both are excellent. Pavers offer easy repairs and a distinctive look, while poured concrete offers a seamless surface. We'll help you choose.

items.question: Do pavers shift or settle over time?
items.answer: With proper base preparation and edge restraints, our paver installations stay stable and level for years.

items.question: Can I match the paver designs shown here?
items.answer: Yes. We offer a wide range of colors, patterns, and styles to create the look you want.
